nodes.name: Read Weekly RSS Digest
nodes.notes: Gets top 5-7 articles from RSS_Raw sheet (filtered by last 7 days)

nodes.name: Read This Week's Content
nodes.notes: Gets published content from this week for 'In Case You Missed It' section

messages.content: You write the weekly newsletter for ScoreMyPrompt, an AI prompt grading tool. Tone: friendly, expert, concise. The newsletter has 4 sections: 1) Prompt Tip of the Week, 2) Top AI News (3-5 items), 3) In Case You Missed It (our content), 4) Challenge (link to scoremyprompt.com/challenge).

nodes.name: Groq: Draft Newsletter
nodes.notes: Tier 1: Groq 70B drafts newsletter from RSS digest + our content

nodes.name: Save Draft to Sheets
nodes.notes: Save newsletter draft to 'Newsletter_Drafts' tab for review

nodes.name: Queue via App API
nodes.notes: Sends to ScoreMyPrompt /api/newsletter/send endpoint (Resend). Set send_now=true to send immediately, false to queue for manual review.

parameters.subject: 📨 Newsletter Draft Ready: {{ $json.subject }}

meta.description: WF-4: Weekly Newsletter. Groq drafts from RSS digest + our content → Saves draft to Sheets → Queues via Resend API. Human reviews before final send.
